title: atalantia rectispinosa
intro: Atalantia rectispinosa, also known as the wild atalantia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Atalantia rectispinosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Atalantia rectispinosa can be prepared into various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat different health conditions.
